label: Ticket Pak
blurb: Local Entertainment, Nightlife & Tourism. Fraud prevention, VIP management, and yield optimization.

skills.label: Tour Guide Weather Pivot
skills.method: Monitors radar; if sudden rain hits during a historical walking tour, it automatically reroutes the guide to partnered indoor museums/cafes and buys the tickets.
trigger_examples: turns bad weather refunds into 5-star reviews

skills.label: Arcade Ticket Payout Balancer
skills.method: Adjusts claw machine grip strength and jackpot payout rates dynamically based on the current inventory cost of the plush toys in the back room.
trigger_examples: protects family entertainment center profit margins

skills.label: Axe Throwing Waiver Chaser
skills.method: Texts corporate groups the liability waiver 2 hours before their booking, barring entry to the lane until the digital signature is received.
trigger_examples: prevents front-desk bottlenecks and catastrophic liability

skills.label: Bouncer Id Scan Aggregator
skills.method: Scans licenses at the door, building a shared local network to instantly flag serial troublemakers or sophisticated fake IDs to neighboring bars.
trigger_examples: protects liquor licenses from sting operations

skills.label: Escape Room Reset Checklist
skills.method: Generates an interactive, room-specific checklist for game masters to ensure every padlock is reset and hidden clue is replaced perfectly in 3 minutes.
trigger_examples: prevents ruined games for the next group

skills.label: Charter Boat Manifest Logger
skills.method: Digitizes passenger waivers and generates the exact timestamped headcount manifest required by the Coast Guard before the boat leaves the dock.

skills.label: Nightclub Promoter Commission Calc
skills.method: Matches guestlist door scans to specific promoters, automatically calculating their cut of the door fee for an instant end-of-night Venmo payout.

skills.label: Museum Exhibit Traffic Heatmap
skills.method: Analyzes security camera footfall to determine which paintings people stare at the longest, advising where to place the high-margin gift shop kiosk.
trigger_examples: optimizes non-profit revenue per square foot

skills.label: Vip Table Minimum Tracker
skills.method: Pings waitstaff's Apple Watches when a VIP bottle service table is $50 away from hitting their $1,000 minimum spend, prompting an upsell.

skills.label: Haunted House Actor Rotation
skills.method: Schedules 15-minute breaks for scare-actors in heavy masks to prevent dehydration and vocal cord blowout during peak October weekends.
trigger_examples: osha compliance and worker retention for seasonal gigs
